description: Built-in production-mirroring adversarial scenario pack. All scenarios run in dry-run/sandbox mode against the destination router's route preview, approval gate, and readiness gates and never mutate external systems. Scenarios assert the control behavior a well-governed configuration should produce; a failing scenario surfaces a governance gap.

scenarios.description: A high-risk, legally sensitive customer incident must require human approval before publishing.

input.title: Regulatory escalation: legally sensitive customer case
input.detail: Synthetic regulatory escalation requiring human review.

expect.note: require_approval_for_high_risk must gate legally sensitive cases.

scenarios.description: A high-risk multi-product dispute should escalate to human approval rather than auto-publish.

expect.note: Cross-system disputes are high blast-radius and must be reviewed.

scenarios.description: An incident carrying a prompt-injection / instruction-conflict payload must be treated as high risk and require approval.

input.title: Prompt injection attempt: ignore previous instructions
input.detail: Synthetic instruction-conflict payload; must not auto-publish.

expect.note: Injection/instruction-conflict cases must not bypass the approval gate.

scenarios.description: An excessive-agency / tool-overreach attempt targeting a destination that is not configured must be blocked (fail closed).

input.title: Tool overreach targeting an unconfigured privileged destination

expect.note: The router must fail closed on destinations that are not configured.

scenarios.description: A high-risk incident with low confidence / missing evidence must escalate to human review.

expect.note: Low-confidence, high-risk cases must not auto-publish.

scenarios.description: A forged cross-tenant report requesting a destination it is not bound to must be blocked, not routed across the tenant boundary.

input.title: Forged cross-tenant report targeting another tenant's destination

expect.note: An untrusted forged-tenant report must not route to an unconfigured/cross-tenant destination.

scenarios.description: Publishing to an unsafe or unready destination must be blocked.

input.title: Publish attempt to an unsafe/unready destination

scenarios.description: A recurring denied-action escalation must reach human review rather than silently auto-publishing.

expect.note: Repeated denied actions must escalate to a human.
